Interface IExecutionBlockStartNode<S extends SourceElement>

All Superinterfaces:
IExecutionElement, IExecutionNode<S>
All Known Subinterfaces:
IExecutionBranchStatement, IExecutionLoopCondition, IExecutionLoopStatement
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractExecutionBlockStartNode, ExecutionBranchStatement, ExecutionLoopCondition, ExecutionLoopStatement, ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionBlockStartNode, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessBranchStatement, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessLoopCondition, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessLoopStatement
public interface IExecutionBlockStartNode<S extends SourceElement> extends IExecutionNode<S>
An extended IExecutionNode which groups several child nodes.

  • Method Details

    • isBlockOpened

      boolean isBlockOpened()
      Checks if a block might be opened.
      Returns:
      false block is definitively not opened, true block is or might be opened.

    • getBlockCompletions
